rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"In ensureFeatureBranchIfNeeded, when prNumber is set (fix-ci on existing PR), code syncs base branch but never checks out the PR's head branch — causing pipeline to run on default branch instead of PR","scope":"pipeline/branching"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"fix-ci on a PR requires both fetching the PR head ref AND explicitly checking it out; syncing base alone is insufficient","scope":"pipeline/branching"}]}
